pi_items.source: ICD-10-CM official code definitions from icd10data.com, AAPC, CMS documentation
ICD-10-CM official documentation confirming I10 is billable code for Essential (primary) hypertension

pi_items.verified_value: 2024-08-15 (valid ISO date format, specific date basis unknown)
pi_items.source: Date format validation via bash date command; no authoritative source for why this specific date was chosen for the task

privileged_info_summary: The task uses NOSH ChartingSystem with synthetic patient data generated by Synthea (Massachusetts cohort, 20 pre-loaded patients via patients.sql). The ICD-10 code I10 is correct and official for hypertension diagnosis. However, the official ICD-10-CM terminology is 'Essential (primary) hypertension' not 'Essential Hypertension' as stated in metadata. The onset date 2024-08-15 is a valid ISO date format but its selection basis is not documented. File paths /tmp/target_patient.txt and /tmp/target_patient_pid.txt are correctly configured in the setup scripts to contain the randomly selected patient name and ID.
